readme:
# commander

Commander option parser ported to C — inspired by visionmedia/commander.js

## Installation

Add to your `dfetch.yaml`:

```yaml
projects:
  - name: ext/commander
    url: https://github.com/clibs/commander
    tag: v1.4.1
```

## Usage

After running `dfetch update`, the library will be available at `ext/commander/`.
